title: clematis terniflora var. terniflora
intro: Clematis terniflora var. terniflora, also known as sweet autumn clematis, is a flowering plant species native to East Asia, characterized by its fragrant white blooms and ability to thrive in shaded environments. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. Consuming the plant's roots, flowers, or leaves is believed to offer health benefits such as lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood sugar, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. In herbal preparations, Clematis terniflora var. terniflora is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are utilized to promote cardiovascular health and overall well-being.
